text:
Forgot to share some BIOS details ...

Intel Core i7-10510U
1.800 Ghz

16384 MB RAM

Came installed with Windows 10

Hyperthreading             - ON in BIOS
Intel SpeedStep Technology - ON in BIOS set to 'Max Performance'
CPU Power Management - ON



Chuck Barker
